svg.title: Paperwork Labs paperclip mark, vertical
svg.desc: Gem-style continuous-wire paperclip in slate ink (#0F172A) with one continuous amber (#F59E0B) span on the right-hand outer-return straight continuing into the adjacent base curve (one geometric moment, roughly 1/6 to 1/4 of perimeter). Long axis is strictly vertical (axis tilt 0 degrees), inner U-bend opens upward, outer return curls downward. Constant 11-unit stroke, round caps and joins, no fills. Canonical favicon and app-icon orientation.
